title: Brahmacharini Chalisa
intro: Shri Brahmacharini Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Brahmacharini
description:
|| Shri Brahmacharini Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Koti koti naman mere mata pita ko, jisne diya sharir.
Balihari jaaun guru dev ne, diya hari bhajan mein seer ||

|| Chaupai ||
Jai jai jag maat Brahmani.
Bhakti mukti vishva kalyani || 1 ||
Veena pustak kar mein sohe.
Sharada sab jag sohe || 2 ||
Hans vahini jai jag mata.
Bhakt janan ki ho sukh daata || 3 ||
Brahmani Brahma lok se aayi.
Maat lok ki karo sahai || 4 ||
Ksheer sindhu mein prakati jab hi.
Devon ne jai boli tab hi || 5 ||
Chaturdash ratano mein maani.
Adbhut maya Ved bakhani || 6 ||
Char Ved shat shastra ki gatha.
Shiv Brahma koi paar na pata || 7 ||
Aadi shakti avatar Bhavani.
Bhakt janon ki maa kalyani || 8 ||
Jab-jab paap bade ati bhare.
Mata shastra kar mein dhare || 9 ||
Paap vinashini tu Jagadamba.
Dharma hetu na kari vilamba || 10 ||
Namo namo Brahmi sukhkari.
Brahma Vishnu Shiv tohe maani || 11 ||
Teri leela ajab nirali.
Sahay karo maa Pallu wali || 12 ||
Dukh chinta sab baadha harni.
Amangal mein mangal karni || 13 ||
Ann poorna ho ann ki daata.
Sab jag palan karti mata || 14 ||
Sarv vyapini asankhya roopa.
To kripa se tarta bhav koopa || 15 ||
Chandra bimb aanan sukhkari.
Aksh maal yut hans savari || 16 ||
Pawan putra ki kari sahai.
Lank jaar anal sit layi || 17 ||
Kop kiya dash kandh pe bhari.
Kutamb samhata sena bhari || 18 ||
Tu hi maat Vidhi Hari Har deva.
Sur nar muni sab karte seva || 19 ||
Dev daanav ka hua samvada.
Maare paapi meti baadha || 20 ||
Shri Narayan ang samayi.
Mohani roop dhara tu maai || 21 ||
Dev daityo ki pankti banayi.
Devon ko maa sudha pilayi || 22 ||
Chaturai kar ke maha maai.
Asuron ko tu diya mitayi || 23 ||
Nau khand manhi neja pharke.
Bhage dusht adham jan dar ke || 24 ||
Terah sau pensath ki saala.
Aasvin maas pakh ujiyala || 25 ||
Ravi sut baar ashtami jwala.
Hans aarudh kar lekar bhala || 26 ||
Nagar kot se kiya payana.
Pallu kot bhaya asthana || 27 ||
Chausath yogini bavan beera.
Sang mein le aayi randheera || 28 ||
Baith bhavan mein nyay chukani.
Dwar pal saadul agwani || 29 ||
Saanjh savere baje nagara.
Uthta bhakton ka jaykara || 30 ||
Madh ke beech khadi maa Brahmani.
Sundar chhavi hontho ki laali || 31 ||
Paas mein baithi maa Veena wali.
Utari madh baithi maha kaali || 32 ||
Lal dhwaja tere mandir pharke.
Man harshata darshan karke || 33 ||
Chait aasoj mein bharta mela.
Door door se aate chela || 34 ||
Koi sang mein, koi akela.
Jaykaro ka deta hela || 35 ||
Kanchan kalash shobha de bhari.
Divya pataka chamke nyari || 36 ||
Sees jhuka jan shraddha dete.
Aashish se jholi bhar lete || 37 ||
Teen lokon ki karta bharta.
Naam liye sab kaaraj sarta || 38 ||
Mujh baalak pe kripa ki jyo.
Bhul chook sab maafi dijyo || 39 ||
Mand mati yeh daas tumhara.
Do maa apni bhakti apara || 40 ||
Jab lagi jiu daya phal paaun.
Tumharo jas main sada hi gaaun || 41 ||

|| Doha ||
Raag dvesh mein lipt man, main kutil buddhi agyaan.
Bhav se paar karo maateshwari, apna anugat jaan ||
meaning:
|| Shri Brahmacharini Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Koti koti naman mere mata pita ko, jisne diya sharir.
(A billion salutations to my parents who gave me this body.)
Balihari jaaun guru dev ne, diya hari bhajan mein seer.
(I sacrifice myself to the Guru who guided my mind towards the worship of Hari.)

|| Chaupai ||
Jai jai jag maat Brahmani.
(Victory, victory to World Mother Brahmani.)
Bhakti mukti vishva kalyani.
(You provide devotion, liberation, and the welfare of the world.)
Veena pustak kar mein sohe.
(With a Veena and book in your hands, you look beautiful.)
Sharada sab jag sohe.
(As Sharada, you beautify the whole world.)
Hans vahini jai jag mata.
(Victory to the Swan-rider World Mother.)
Bhakt janan ki ho sukh daata.
(You are the bestower of happiness to your devotees.)
Brahmani Brahma lok se aayi.
(Brahmani, you came from Brahma Lok.)
Maat lok ki karo sahai.
(Please help the mortals of this world.)
Ksheer sindhu mein prakati jab hi.
(When you appeared in the Ocean of Milk,)
Devon ne jai boli tab hi.
(The gods chanted your victory then.)
Chaturdash ratano mein maani.
(You are considered among the fourteen gems.)
Adbhut maya Ved bakhani.
(The Vedas describe your wonderful illusion.)
Char Ved shat shastra ki gatha.
(The stories of the four Vedas and six Shastras are yours.)
Shiv Brahma koi paar na paata.
(Even Shiva and Brahma could not find your limits.)
Aadi shakti avatar Bhavani.
(You are the Primal Power avatar, Bhavani.)
Bhakt janon ki maa kalyani.
(You are the welfare-bestowing mother to the devotees.)
Jab-jab paap bade ati bhare.
(Whenever sins increased greatly,)
Mata shastra kar mein dhare.
(Mother, you held weapons in your hands.)
Paap vinashini tu Jagadamba.
(You are Jagadamba, the destroyer of sins.)
Dharma hetu na kari vilamba.
(You do not delay for the sake of Dharma.)
Namo namo Brahmi sukhkari.
(Salutations to Brahmi, the bringer of happiness.)
Brahma Vishnu Shiv tohe maani.
(Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva acknowledge you.)
Teri leela ajab nirali.
(Your play is wonderfully unique.)
Sahay karo maa Pallu wali.
(Help us, O Mother of Pallu.)
Dukh chinta sab baadha harni.
(You are the remover of all sorrow, worry, and obstacles.)
Amangal mein mangal karni.
(You bring auspiciousness amidst inauspiciousness.)
Ann poorna ho ann ki daata.
(As Annapurna, you are the giver of food.)
Sab jag palan karti mata.
(You are the mother who nurtures the whole world.)
Sarv vyapini asankhya roopa.
(You are all-pervading and have countless forms.)
To kripa se tarta bhav koopa.
(By your grace, one crosses the worldly well of existence.)
Chandra bimb aanan sukhkari.
(Your moon-like face is delightful.)
Aksh maal yut hans savari.
(You ride a swan and hold a rosary.)
Pawan putra ki kari sahai.
(You helped the Son of Wind (Hanuman),)
Lank jaar anal sit layi.
(You brought the fire to burn Lanka.)
Kop kiya dash kandh pe bhari.
(You were greatly angry at the Ten-headed one (Ravana),)
Kutamb samhata sena bhari.
(And destroyed his family and massive army.)
Tu hi maat Vidhi Hari Har deva.
(You are the Mother of Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva.)
Sur nar muni sab karte seva.
(Gods, humans, and sages all serve you.)
Dev daanav ka hua samvada.
(When the dialogue/conflict of gods and demons happened,)
Maare paapi meti baadha.
(You killed the sinners and erased the obstacles.)
Shri Narayan ang samayi.
(You merged into the limb of Shri Narayan,)
Mohani roop dhara tu maai.
(And took the Mohini form, O Mother.)
Dev daityo ki pankti banayi.
(You made lines of gods and demons,)
Devon ko maa sudha pilayi.
(And fed the nectar to the gods, Mother.)
Chaturai kar ke maha maai.
(With cleverness, O Great Mother,)
Asuron ko tu diya mitayi.
(You erased the demons.)
Nau khand manhi neja pharke.
(Your spear/flag waves across the nine regions,)
Bhage dusht adham jan dar ke.
(Wicked and lowly people flee in fear.)
Terah sau pensath ki saala.
(In the year thirteen hundred sixty-five,)
Aasvin maas pakh ujiyala.
(In the bright fortnight of the month of Ashwin.)
Ravi sut baar ashtami jwala.
(On Sunday, the eighth day, your flame appeared,)
Hans aarudh kar lekar bhala.
(Riding the swan, holding a spear.)
Nagar kot se kiya payana.
(You started your journey from Nagar Kot,)
Pallu kot bhaya asthana.
(And made Pallu Kot your abode.)
Chausath yogini bavan beera.
(The sixty-four Yoginis and fifty-two brave ones,)
Sang mein le aayi randheera.
(You brought along, O brave warrior.)
Baith bhavan mein nyay chukani.
(Sitting in the building, you dispense justice,)
Dwar pal saadul agwani.
(With the gatekeeper lion in the lead.)
Saanjh savere baje nagara.
(Morning and evening, the drums play,)
Uthta bhakton ka jaykara.
(And the cheers of devotees rise.)
Madh ke beech khadi maa Brahmani.
(Standing in the middle of the temple, Mother Brahmani,)
Sundar chhavi hontho ki laali.
(Beautiful image, with redness of the lips.)
Paas mein baithi maa Veena wali.
(The Veena-playing Mother sits nearby,)
Utari madh baithi maha kaali.
(And Maha Kali descended into the temple.)
Lal dhwaja tere mandir pharke.
(The red flag waves at your temple,)
Man harshata darshan karke.
(The mind rejoices upon seeing you.)
Chait aasoj mein bharta mela.
(A fair is held in Chaitra and Ashwin,)
Door door se aate chela.
(Followers come from far and wide.)
Koi sang mein, koi akela.
(Some together, some alone,)
Jaykaro ka deta hela.
(Giving a shout of victory.)
Kanchan kalash shobha de bhari.
(The golden urn looks very beautiful,)
Divya pataka chamke nyari.
(The divine flag shines uniquely.)
Sees jhuka jan shraddha dete.
(People bow their heads with devotion,)
Aashish se jholi bhar lete.
(And fill their bags with your blessings.)
Teen lokon ki karta bharta.
(You are the creator and sustainer of the three worlds,)
Naam liye sab kaaraj sarta.
(By taking your name, all work is accomplished.)
Mujh baalak pe kripa ki jyo.
(Shower grace on this child of yours,)
Bhul chook sab maafi dijyo.
(And forgive all my mistakes.)
Mand mati yeh daas tumhara.
(I am a slow-witted slave of yours,)
Do maa apni bhakti apara.
(Mother, give me your infinite devotion.)
Jab lagi jiu daya phal paaun.
(As long as I live, I receive the fruit of your mercy,)
Tumharo jas main sada hi gaaun.
(May I always sing your glory.)

|| Doha ||
Raag dvesh mein lipt man, main kutil buddhi agyaan.
(My mind is caught in attachment and aversion; I am of crooked intellect and ignorant.)
Bhav se paar karo maateshwari, apna anugat jaan.
(Please ferry me across this worldly ocean, Mother, knowing me as your follower.)

faq.a1: The name 'Brahmacharini' means one who practices penance (Tapa). She symbolizes purity, devotion, and steadfast dedication. She holds a rosary (Japa Mala) in her right hand and a water pot (Kamandalu) in her left.
faq.q2: What is the main benefit of worshiping her?
faq.a2: Worshiping Maa Brahmacharini instills self-control, determination, and focus. She blesses students and seekers with mental clarity and success in their endeavors.
faq.a3: Maa Brahmacharini governs the 'Swadhisthana Chakra.' Her worship helps in activating and balancing this energy center.
faq.q4: When is the auspicious day to worship her?
faq.a4: The second day of Navratri (Dwitiya) is dedicated to Maa Brahmacharini.
faq.q5: What is the appropriate offering (Bhog) for her?
faq.a5: Sugar or Mishri (rock sugar) is considered her favorite offering. It is believed that offering sugar to her brings the blessing of longevity.
